sample. The "enhanced" indicator variable allows for longitudinal study of the 5% sample (i.e., once in, 
always in). 

CCW creates the 5% sample using standard CMS processes. The 5% random sample consists of people 
who had a Medicare beneficiary Health Insurance Claim number (HIC) equal to the Claim Account 
Number (CAN) plus Beneficiary Identity Code (BIC) (HIC=CAN+BIC) where the last two digits of the CAN 
are in the set {05,
